mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER_INQUIRY(ID, MEMBER_INQUIRY_TYPE, MEMBER_INQUIRY_DETAIL, MEMBER_INQUIRY_STATUS, MEMBER_ID) VALUES(SEQ_MEMBER_INQUIRY.NEXTVAL, #{memberInquiryType}, #{memberInquiryDetail}, #{memberInquiryStatus}, #{memberId})
mapper.select: SELECT MI.ID, MI.MEMBER_INQUIRY_TYPE, M.MEMBER_NAME, M.MEMBER_EMAIL, MI.CREATED_DATE, MI.MEMBER_INQUIRY_STATUS, MI.MEMBER_INQUIRY_DETAIL FROM TBL_MEMBER_INQUIRY MI JOIN TBL_MEMBER M ON MI.MEMBER_ID = M.ID WHERE MI.ID = #{id}
